totalAuthorizedShares.description: Total shares authorized across all types of securities

totalOutstandingShares.description: Total outstanding shares across all types of securities

totalCommonStockEquivalentShares.description: Total common equivalent (a.k.a. fully diluted) shares across all types of securities

percentageOfFullyDilutedOutstandingShare.description: Percentage of fully diluted outstanding shares across all types of securities

percentageOfFullyDilutedAvailableShares.description: Percentage of fully diluted available shares across all types of securities

currentFMV.description: The fair market value for the company per share (usually the latest 409A valuation for private companies)

classesOfSecurities.description: List of summary information for all classes of securities for the company

plans.description: List of summary information for all plans for the company

certificatedShares.description: Whether the stock certificates are paper (value 'false' indicates they are digital)
